summary: Build a simple browser-based Aviator-style demo game (HTML/CSS/JS) with start and cash-out controls and provide a shareable link.
architectural_notes: Implement as a static single-page app using HTML/CSS/vanilla JavaScript (no backend required).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimal airplane silhouette icon, flat vector style, mint accent on dark background (aviator-plane-icon.dim_256x256.png)
- Wide night-sky gradient background with subtle stars and a faint horizon glow (aviator-sky-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Create a single-page Aviator-style crash game demo in the React + TypeScript frontend that reproduces the provided behavior: a multiplier starts at 1.00x, increases by 0.05 every 100ms while running, and randomly crashes between 1.00x and 6.00x; include Start and Cash Out controls and show the outcome text (“Crashed at …x” or “Cashed out at …x”).

Add a cohesive, distinct visual theme for the demo (colors, typography, and layout) inspired by a dark “night sky cockpit” style; apply it consistently using Tailwind (avoid blue/purple as primary colors) while keeping the core UI minimal (title, multiplier, controls, result).
Add generated static image assets for the game UI and render them from the frontend as static files under frontend/public/assets/generated (do not serve images from the backend).

Provide a simple “link to access it” via clear run/deploy instructions in project documentation (local and Internet Computer deployment), including where to find the local URL and the canister URL after deploy.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a simple Aviator-style browser game demo from provided HTML/CSS/JS and provide a link to access it
